notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies reaches on a fielder's choice. Drake Baldwin to 2nd. Drake Baldwin advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Edmundo Sosa.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Marsh GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Edmundo Sosa out at 2nd. Brandon Marsh out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Matt Olson batting, Ozzie Albies picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Trea Turner.
